data.title: HUEY MAGOO'S INTRODUCES FREE-STANDING CONDENSED DRIVE-THRU PROTOTYPE TO EXPAND REAL ESTATE OPTIONS AND SUPPORT FRANCHISE GROWTH
data.description: A new ground-up model has been introduced, providing franchisees with a more flexible and cost-effective way to expand while reducing development costs by around 40%. Huey Magoo's, a well-known fast-casual chain specializing in handcrafted chicken, launched this initiative in Orlando on May 1, 2026. Franchisees will benefit from increased efficiency and easier access to growth opportunities.

data.title: 12 Press Releases You Need to See This Week
data.description: McDonald's is introducing a fresh selection of beverages, Southwest Airlines unveils its America250 design, and a new TI-84 graphing calculator is in the works. Additionally, notable earnings from the week are summarized. This update comes from New York as of May 1, 2026. Numerous press releases flood the media every week, making it challenging to stay abreast of the latest developments.

data.title: Individual Vision Insurance for Retirees (2026): VSP Vision Care Selected for Standalone Post-Work Coverage by Consumer365
data.description: VSP® Individual Vision Plans has been recognized by Consumer365 as a prominent provider in the retiree vision insurance sector for 2026. This acknowledgement highlights the increasing trend of retirees opting for personalized coverage solutions. The shift towards self-managed plans is becoming more prevalent as individuals seek flexibility in their insurance choices. The recognition underscores the importance of VSP® in catering to the evolving needs of retirees, with a growing number of individuals choosing independent vision insurance coverage.

data.title: IDEAYA Biosciences Announces Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in South San Francisco, IDEAYA Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: IDYA), a precision medicine oncology firm focusing on targeted therapeutics, revealed that on April 30, 2026, the Compensation Committee of the company...

data.title: Deere & Company Board Elects Brent Norwood as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Today, Deere & Company appointed Brent Norwood, aged 44, as the new senior vice president and chief financial officer. This decision was made by the Board of Directors and is effective as of May 1, 2026. The selection of Norwood came after a thorough internal and external search process. Deere & Company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DE.

data.title: American Christian Clergy Travel to Japan to Defend Religious Freedom and Stand with Family Federation Believers
data.description: This week in Tokyo, over 100 clergy and young people from the United States journeyed to demonstrate solidarity with the Family Federation for World Peace and Unification. The delegation aimed to champion religious freedom and support the organization's initiatives.

data.title: The School District of Philadelphia Moves to Modernize Student Mobility with Zum
data.description: A district in Pennsylvania has collaborated with Zum for transportation services, starting in the 2026-2027 academic year. The School District of Philadelphia chose Zum to enhance its student transportation services for the upcoming school year. This partnership marks a shift towards modernizing student mobility operations within the district. The news was announced on May 1, 2026, from Redwood City, California.

data.title: Cook County Treasurer Pappas and Alliance of Polish Clubs President Mirowska-Kopec recognize Polish population by honoring local leaders ahead of Polish Constitution Day
data.description: In Chicago on May 1, 2026, Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas will be present for the raising of the Polish Flag ceremony at Daley Plaza. The event is scheduled for noon and will also feature Alliance of Polish Clubs USA President Lucja Mirowska-Kopec. Following the flag-raising, Pappas and Mirowska-Kopec will lead a ceremony to recognize and honor local leaders.

data.title: Chevron Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) announced earnings of $2.2 billion, equivalent to $1.11 per share on a diluted basis, a decrease from the $3.5 billion in earnings, or $2.00 per share on a diluted basis, in the same period in 2025. This quarter's earnings were affected by a net loss of $360 million linked to a legal reserve, and foreign currency fluctuations resulted in a decrease of $223 million. Adjusted earnings for the first quarter of 2026 were reported at $2.8 billion, or $1.41 per share on a diluted basis, compared to adjusted earnings of $3.8 billion in the first quarter of 2025.

data.title: Best State to Start a Side Hustle (2026): Registered Agents Inc Highlights Wyoming's Tax Advantages by Expert Consumers
data.description: In a recent report by Expert Consumers, insights from Registered Agents Inc have highlighted the top state for launching a side business in 2026. The analysis suggests that Wyoming stands out due to its favorable tax conditions and reputation for privacy. This information is based on data provided by Expert Consumers and Registered Agents Inc, pointing to Wyoming as a prominent choice for individuals seeking to embark on a side hustle.

data.title: Flowco Holdings Inc. Announces Appointment of New Independent Director
data.description: Houston-based Flowco Holdings Inc. (NYSE: FLOC) revealed the addition of Hardy Murchison as an independent director to its Board of Directors, commencing April 29, 2026. With this appointment, the Board's strength now stands at eight directors, with four of them being independent. Murchison, the Founder, CEO, and Director of Encino Energy, brings valuable expertise to the Board. Encino Energy, led by Murchison, was a trailblazer in the Utica oil play initiative.

data.title: TIME Names Xenco Medical one of the TIME100 Most Influential Companies in the World and the Winner of the 2026 TIME100 Impact Award in Health
data.description: Xenco Medical, based in San Diego, has been recognized by Time Magazine as one of the TIME100 Most Influential Companies globally. In addition, the company has been honored with the 2026 TIME100 Impact Award in Health.

data.title: The Estée Lauder Companies Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
data.description: In New York, The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) shared their financial outcomes for the third quarter ending March 31, 2026. According to Stéphane de La Faverie, the President and CEO, the results continued the robust performance of the company driven by Beauty Reimagined. Throughout the first nine months of fiscal 2026, organic sales for Fragrance notably increased by double digits. Among the four regions, three experienced growth, notably led by high single-digit growth in Mainland China where the company outshone its competitors in the prestige segment.

data.title: Ford Marks America’s 250th by Putting American Values to Work
data.description: Ford Motor Company, headquartered in Dearborn, Michigan, is launching the "American Value. For American Values." campaign as the United States nears its 250th anniversary. This initiative aims to demonstrate the company's dedication to American principles by supporting employees, customers, and communities nationwide. Through this program, Ford is offering employee pricing to customers at select dealerships on the majority of new 2025 models. This campaign underscores Ford's commitment to embodying American values and giving back to the individuals who contribute to the nation's progress.

data.title: MT Højgaard Holding A/S: Conference call 8 May at 10.00 CEST about Q1 2026
data.description: On May 8, 2026, MT Højgaard Holding will unveil its Q1 2026 interim report, followed by a conference call at 10:00 (CEST) where the management team will discuss the results and future outlook. The call is open for all without the need for registration.

data.title: AH Realty Trust Completes Sale of Construction Business, Advancing the Company’s Strategic Transformation and Focus on Long‑Term Shareholder Value
data.description: AH Realty Trust, previously known as Armada Hoffler, has disclosed the completion of the sale of its construction division in Virginia Beach, Virginia. The total transaction amount for the sale stands at $2.4 million. The company, trading under the ticker symbol NYSE: AHRT, shared this development on May 1, 2026.

data.title: Flowco Holdings Inc. Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend Increase
data.description: Houston-based Flowco Holdings Inc. (NYSE: FLOC), a company specializing in production optimization, artificial lift, and emissions management for the oil and natural gas sector, has revealed an uptick in their quarterly cash dividend to $0.09 per share of Class A common stock. The increased dividend is set to be disbursed on May 27, 2026, to Class A common stockholders recorded as of May 15, 2026. This move was approved by Flowco's Board of Directors, showcasing the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder value.

data.title: Ellomay Capital Announces the Filing of the Annual Report on Form 20-F for 2025
data.description: Tel-Aviv, Israel - May 01, 2026 - Ellomay Capital Ltd. disclosed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Ellomay, known for its focus on renewable energy and power initiatives, operates in key regions such as Europe, USA, and Israel. Traded on NYSE American and TASE under the ticker symbol ELLO, the Company maintains a strong presence in the energy sector and is dedicated to the development of renewable energy projects worldwide.
